name: io.github.gba3124/mcp
description: Webhook operations for AI agents — zero-config: the anyhook_quickstart tool creates a free relay endpoint + API key with no signup. Inspect events, replay deliveries, mock signed payloads, verify signatures, directly from Claude / Cursor / Claude Code.

environmentVariables.name: ANYHOOK_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Personal API key from anyhook.net/dashboard/settings/api-keys. Starts with ahk_live_. When set, tools query the live account; when absent, tools operate on an in-memory store for local dev.

environmentVariables.name: ANYHOOK_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL. Defaults to https://www.anyhook.net. Used by self-hosted AnyHook installations.
